message:
feat(fwc): add discovery truth contract with provenance tracking

Add DiscoveryDataSource enum, DiscoveryProvenance struct, and helper
functions to ensure discovery commands (list, search, show, ops, schema,
examples, suggest) honestly label the source and freshness of their data.
Live sources are authoritative; offline sources carry freshness caveats.

16 new tests covering source classification, provenance envelopes,
serde roundtrips, and cross-cutting invariants.

Bead: 1g7z0.29.5.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
